E. The Designing, Fabricating, and Fitting of Orthotic and Self-Help Devices. 

EXAMPLE: Construction of a device which would enable a patient to hold a utensil and 
feed themselves independently. 

EXAMPLE: Construction of a hand splint for a patient with rheumatoid arthritis to 
maintain the hand in a functional position. 

F. Vocational and Prevocational Assessment and Training
